{{Quote|The luckiest day of my life was when your clan kidnapped me. How else would we have ever met?|Tassa's husband, Rikkar-Du|<ref name="Legacy (2006) 13" />}}
'''Tassa''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Codru-Ji]] and the daughter of a clan leader. Her clan kidnapped [[Rikkar-Du]], a member of a rival clan, and they eventually married and had a son, [[Jassar]]. In [[137 ABY]], when [[Darth Kruhl]], a [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] of the [[One Sith]] tried to secure her husband's support for the [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|Sith Empire]], he refused and was [[Assassination on Munto Codru|assassinated]], while Tassa was killed by [[Kassek-Ka]], a rival clan leader loyal to the Empire.<ref name="Legacy (2006) 13" />
